message:
fix(abi): dlsym delegates to host for non-default handles, pthread_create fallback

Bug: dlsym() ignored the handle parameter and always resolved from our
internal symbol table. For handles from dlopen("libc.so.6"), this meant
dlsym(handle, "pthread_create") returned our OWN function, not the host's.

Fix: For handles other than RTLD_DEFAULT and our main program handle,
try versioned resolution via dlvsym_next before falling back to internal table.

Also added libc.so.6 dlopen+dlsym fallback in native_pthread_create for
when the OnceLock-based host resolution hasn't been prewarmed.

df now works. sort/git/du still fail — native create_thread lacks CLONE_SETTLS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
